race.comment: HELL OF A LAD (8) followed an unplaced effort first-up two runs back with a third last start over 1200m at this track. Has his share of talent and is hard to beat in this suitable race. RUBYDOO (9) has been thereabouts recently, the latest result a fourth beaten 0.6 lengths at Ipswich over 1350m. Has solid claims on best form. LUDIK (6) is a distance specialist who finished fifth two runs back then improved last start but found a couple better over 1625m at this venue, beaten 2 lengths. Has his share of ability and will prove hard to beat in this suitable race. HOLLYWOOD EPIC (1) showed good early dash and raced on the speed last start before fading to finish half a length back in fourth over 1300m at this course. Has ability and a bold showing is expected.
